E-fficient × Seriti
Steady-state revenue engine & industry relationship builder
Strategic Positioning

E-fficient is Find and Drive's first commercial product, developed in partnership with Seriti. It is not the big swing — it is a Steady Eddie: a practical, relationship-first product that earns its place in the motor industry by being genuinely useful, not by trying to reinvent the wheel.

While Kredo offers a comparable solution within the Seriti ecosystem, E-fficient is consumer-facing — a meaningful distinction that makes dealer adoption straightforward without stepping on existing workflows.

4%
Lead generation rate of total website traffic
0
Days to go live — widget embeds immediately
VAS
Value-added services layer for retention
The Problem

The finance widget does its job — leads come through consistently. The real issue is lead quality, not volume. Most dealerships are running ad campaigns with little to no optimisation and weak SEO, which means the traffic arriving on their sites is the wrong traffic. That flows through the widget and produces leads that go nowhere. The widget is fine; what's feeding it isn't.

E-fficient is a lead magnet first. The value-added digital marketing services layer — delivered in partnership with an existing, reputable provider — is what turns it from a widget into a customer retention play — better traffic in, better leads out, and dealers who see results and stick around.
The Retention Loop
1
Widget Goes Live
Finance widget goes up on the dealer's site. Leads start coming in immediately — roughly 4% of total site traffic.
2
VAS Cleans Up the Traffic
Digital marketing services, delivered in partnership with an existing and reputable provider, fix the ad campaigns and SEO so the right people are landing on the site in the first place.
3
Lead Quality Improves
Better traffic in means better leads out. Dealers start seeing the difference in the quality of enquiries coming through.
4
Dealers Stay, Relationships Grow
Dealers who see results keep the product. Revenue becomes recurring. The relationship with the network strengthens over time.
Commercial Objective

E-fficient is not the product that takes Find and Drive where it needs to go. It is the product that funds the journey. The goal with the current sales pipeline is simple: get to a point where E-fficient revenue covers cost of sale and clears the non-current liabilities. Self-sustaining, cash flow positive, and well-positioned in the dealer network.

There is an additional strategic upside worth noting: as volume grows, E-fficient begins to generate meaningful data on South African car buyers — their behaviour, intent, and affordability patterns. This is not the primary objective, but it is a valuable by-product that could inform how Find and Drive develops its broader platform over time.

Self-Sustaining Covers Cost of Sale Clears Non-Current Liabilities Industry Relationship Builder SA Car Buyer Data

E-fficient — Product Overview
Technical architecture, core features & dealer integration
Technical Foundation

E-fficient is built on an API-driven backend that supports two deployment paths: fully custom development for dealers with specific requirements, and a standard plug-and-play front-end interface embedded as a widget directly onto any dealer website. Low barrier to entry — a dealer can be live the same day.

Dealer Website — Widget Live
Finance Pre-Qualification Flow
Core Features
Customer Intent Signals
  • Drop-off categorisation identifies where customers exit the journey — step 1 drop-offs are treated as low intent, while customers who progress to providing their ID number are classified as medium-to-high intent
  • Gives dealers a structured view of their pipeline without lifting a finger
Customer Data Capture
  • Every interaction event is stored — including customers who drop off mid-journey
  • Builds a valuable database of in-market consumers who showed intent but did not complete, enabling follow-up and future re-engagement
Vehicle Finance Pre-Qualification
  • Combines live credit bureau data with front-end bank scorecard logic to give customers a real-time indication of their finance eligibility
  • Customers receive an honest affordability picture — improving lead quality and reducing wasted applications downstream
Seriti Solutions Integration
  • Completed widget applications are automatically surfaced inside the Seriti F&I portal — no manual data transfer required
  • Enables instant bank submission, accelerating the deal and removing friction between the lead and the finance desk
Value Added Services — Expanded Offering

Beyond the widget itself, Find and Drive offers a broader service layer designed to support dealers at every stage of their digital presence — from getting online for the first time to managing a multi-branch operation.

Single-Branch Dealers
  • Free website setup for small, single-branch dealers who currently have no web presence
  • Standard E-fficient widget included, with a fixed monthly fee for the widget subscription
  • Low-barrier entry point — gets dealers onto the platform and generating leads quickly
Multi-Branch Dealers
  • Once-off setup fee covering build, configuration and onboarding across all branches
  • Monthly subscription covering website hosting and widget access
  • Scalable model — subscription revenue grows in line with the dealer network
This tiered VAS structure means Find and Drive can serve the full spectrum of the dealer market — from the small independent lot to the large multi-site group — while building a predictable, recurring revenue base alongside the lead generation business.

FY 2026 Targets
Revenue Target
  • R300k MRR by financial year end 2026
  • Gross profit margin target of 40–60%
  • Self-sustaining model covering cost of sale and non-current liabilities
Operating Model
  • Low operating overhead by design — lean structure with high margin potential
  • Dealer relationship management leveraged through Seriti Solutions account executives — reducing the need for a large internal sales force
  • Recurring subscription revenue compounds with each new account
